author: Xbox
text:
Hell Let Loose: Vietnam | Release Date Trailer
Unleash hell in the jungle on June 18, 2026. Pre-order now.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/hell-let-loose-vietnam/9PKS8XZC74X5

Step into the explosive fury of war with Hell Let Loose: Vietnam. Play a decisive role in one of the most iconic conflicts in history with expansive 50v50 player battles, where teamwork, tactics and an arsenal of destructive weapons combine to shape the battlefield in your favour.

About Team17 Group plc:
Founded in 1990, Team17 Digital is a leading developer, video games label, and creative partner for developers around the world. Part of Team17 Group plc, which floated on AIM in 2018, Team17 Digital has an extensive portfolio comprised of over 120 titles, and fully encapsulates the spirit of independent games. Team17 Digital’s portfolio of multi-award-winning and award-nominated in-house brands include Hell Let Loose, Golf With Your Friends, The Escapists, and the iconic Worms franchise, alongside its games label partner titles, including the award-winning games Blasphemous, Greak: Memories of Azur, and Overcooked! franchise.

author: Xbox
text:
Ticket to Ride® | Round the World Ticket Trailer
🚂 Embark on the ultimate railway adventure with Ticket to Ride® and the Round the World Ticket! 

Delve into a captivating 3D world, take on expert AI, and enjoy diverse gameplay modes. Play on your own, with fans from around the world or with your friends and family. Explore 10 new expansions, add more trains to your fleet and meet characters everywhere you go.  

All aboard – get started now!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/ticket-to-ride/9PLD08F553L4

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/ticket-to-ride-round-the-world-ticket/9NX1G9GQWKJP
